payload.answer: Ambiguous concurrent employment claims for Sam: Goldman and Point72 both appear as tentative statements.

entity_resolution.reason: The two concurrent writes refer to the same named person but assert different employers; there is insufficient evidence to reconcile them into one durable current fact.

details: Detected conflicting concurrent writes about Sam's employer.
Avoided collapsing the claims into a single current fact.

repair_options: Ask for the current employer and timestamp both claims.
Store both as historical/uncertain until one is confirmed.
Link the statements as conflicting pending resolution.

raw_text: {"intent":"evaluate_conflict","decision":"do_not_commit_as_single_current_fact","memory_cards":[{"kind":"fact","statement":"Sam works at Goldman.","confidence":"low","entities":[{"name":"Sam","type":"person","role":"subject"},{"name":"Goldman","type":"organization","role":"employer"}],"relationships":[{"subject":"Sam","predicate":"works_at","object":"Goldman"}]},{"kind":"fact","statement":"Sam joined Point72.","confidence":"low","entities":[{"name":"Sam","type":"person","role":"subject"},{"name":"Point72","type":"organization","role":"employer"}],"relationships":[{"subject":"Sam","predicate":"joined","object":"Point72"}]}],"entity_resolution":{"action":"defer","entity_id":null,"reason":"The two concurrent writes refer to the same named person but assert different employers; there is insufficient evidence to reconcile them into one durable current fact."},"conflict_classification":"concurrent_conflicting_facts","answer":"Ambiguous concurrent employment claims for Sam: Goldman and Point72 both appear as tentative statements.","citations":["Sam works at Goldman.","Sam joined Point72."],"repair_options":["Ask for the current employer and timestamp both claims.","Store both as historical/uncertain until one is confirmed.","Link the statements as conflicting pending resolution."],"receipt":{"success":true,"details":["Detected conflicting concurrent writes about Sam's employer.","Avoided collapsing the claims into a single current fact."]}}
